name: SAMA CK1900 RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
highlights: The SAMA CK1900 RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard is built for high performance with mechanical keys , RGB backlighting offering 20+ effects, and anti-ghosting capabilities for smooth gameplay
This multimedia keyboard features a full-size layout with 104 keys, perfect for gaming or productivity
Its spill-resistant and ultra-thin design ensures durability and comfort, while the plug and play functionality makes setup a breeze
Ideal for laptop users, the SAMA CK1900 combines style and functionality, making it the perfect choice for anyone seeking a RGB mechanical keyboard for gaming or office use
description: SAMA CK1900 RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard Price in Pakistan and Key Features: RGB Backlighting : 20+ RGB effects for customizable lighting styles. Full-Sized Layout : 104 keys, perfect for gaming and typing. Mechanical Keys : Enhanced tactile feedback for a better gaming experience. Anti-Ghosting : Multi-key rollover for accurate keypress registration. Spill Resistant : Protects against accidental spills for durability. Plug and Play : Easy setup with no additional software required. Ultra-Thin
